wordCodeAnalogies.note: Each letter forward by 1 in alphabet
Vowel change i->o for past tense
Number-code Q in wrong topic: PEN=123, find NEP
Number-code Q: HAT=123, what is A?
Number-code Q: CORN=1234, find NOON (repeated letters)
Number-code Q: SILK=1234, find KILL (repeated letters)
Number-code Q: GULP=1234, find PLUG (full reversal)
Number-code Q: TOAD=1234, DATO=4312, find DOT
Number-code Q: PIG=362, GIP=263, find GIG
Number-code Q: CAT=415, TAC=514, find ACT
Number-code Q: HOG=539, GOH=935, find GO
Number-code Q: BET=827, TEB=728, find TEE
Number-code Q: RUG=864, GUR=468, find U
Number-code Q: SET=693, TES=396, find SEES
Number-code Q: MAP=573, PAM=375, find MAMA
Remove first letter THEN reverse: CLAP->LAP->PAL
Replace first letter G with another
Remove first letter THEN reverse: SNAP->NAP->PAN
Letter back by 2, number up by 1
Letters advance by 2: AC, CE, EG

numberWordCodes.note: Two words SPOT+TOPS share all letters, cross-reference to find O
LAMP=5436, PALM=6453, build table then encode MAP
BANK=2134, KNAB=4312, build table then encode NAB
CAR=312, ARC=123, cross-reference to find what 3 represents
Two codes NET=152, TEN=251, cross-reference to find 5
Two codes POT=617, TOP=716, find T
Two codes PEAR+REAP, cross-reference to find what 2 represents
Two codes LATE+TALE, cross-reference to find what 9 represents
Two codes MEAT+TEAM, cross-reference then encode TAME
Two codes ROPE+PORE, cross-reference then encode REPO
Two codes NAIL+LAIN, cross-reference to find what 3 represents
Two words CART+CARD share 3 letters, cross-reference to find D=5, then encode DART
Two words LAND+SAND share 3 letters, cross-reference to find S=3
PLAN+PANE share 3 letters, find new letter E=7, encode LEAN
SHIP+WHIP share 3 letters, find W=9, encode WISH
MIST+FIST share 3 letters, find F=5, encode FITS
GOAT+BOAT differ in first letter only, eliminate to find O=1
FAST+LAST differ in first letter, eliminate to find S=4
MINT+HINT differ in first letter, eliminate to find N=1
BEAR+DEAR differ in first letter, eliminate to find R=3
BAND+BEND differ in second letter, eliminate to find A=2
COLD+BOLD differ in first letter, eliminate to find C=9
ROPE+ROBE share 3 letters, find B=8, encode BORE
TIN+NIT two codes, cross-reference to find IN
BROAD+BOARD share all letters, cross-reference then encode ROAD

sharedLetter.note: T: CAT+TEN, BUT+TANK. Simple 2 pairs, consonant
Longer words: MEAT+TABLE, COST+TENNIS. Standard 2-pair format
DESK+KING, RISK+KITE. K is unusual letter
BUSH+HANG, PATH+HOST. H is less common
ORBIT+TRADE, CHART+TIGER. Longer words, need strategy
STUMP+PEARL, EQUIP+PATCH. EQUIP is very restrictive
CLIMB+BREAD, DISTURB+BLANK. Silent B in CLIMB
ABSORB+BENCH, SUPERB+BRAIN. B ending is restrictive
ELASTIC+CLOUD, FABRIC+CRANE. C ending very restrictive
MAJESTIC+CAMEL, CLASSIC+CATCH. C ending very restrictive
